documents.title: GFS Banker Teaser One-Pager
documents.content: Executive summary for SBA lenders. Highlights $19.1M revenue, $2.94M EBITDA, 2.32x DSCR, strong management team, and recurring service contracts. Designed to get a banker pre-qual call within 48 hours.

documents.title: Woody One-Pager (Cash Offer Rebuttal)
documents.content: Counters Woody's preference for cash offers. Shows how SBA-backed deal provides better net proceeds, tax advantages, and continued involvement. Includes side-by-side comparison.

documents.title: GFS SafeGuard Program
documents.content: Recurring revenue subscription model for fire protection maintenance. Monthly monitoring, priority service, annual inspections. Target: Convert 40% of one-time customers to $99-299/month plans.

documents.title: GFS 6mo/2yr/5yr Game Plan
documents.content: 6 months: Close acquisition, stabilize ops, launch SafeGuard. 2 years: $30M revenue via organic + 2 tuck-in acquisitions. 5 years: $50M revenue, regional dominance in DFW fire protection.

documents.title: Banker Call Prep + Script
documents.content: Step-by-step script for the Live Oak Bank pre-qualification call. Covers: introduction, deal overview, financials summary, borrower profile, key questions to ask, and follow-up action items.

documents.title: Woody Growth Pitch
documents.content: Pitch deck for Woody showing GFS growth trajectory under new ownership. Highlights SafeGuard program, territory expansion, fleet optimization, and technology upgrades. Projects 2.5x revenue in 5 years.

documents.title: Woody Meeting Agenda (Minute-by-Minute)
documents.content: Full 45-minute meeting playbook for the Woody sit-down. Covers pre-meeting checklist, value stack walkthrough, 3-minute growth pitch, objection handling with escalation ladder, closing question, and post-meeting follow-up protocol.

documents.title: GFS Acquisition Targets (11 DFW Companies)
documents.content: List of 11 fire protection companies in the DFW metroplex identified as potential tuck-in acquisitions. Includes estimated revenue, employee count, service area, and strategic rationale for each.

documents.title: NNN Broker List
documents.content: Top 5 NNN brokers in MO, TX, CO specializing in Starbucks/QSR exits and 1031 exchanges. Includes names, direct phones, emails, and recommended first-call strategy.

documents.title: JB Credit Payoff Plan
documents.content: Strategic credit optimization plan. USAA paid in full 3/26. Chase at 3%. Overall utilization ~7%. Projected FICO 740-760. Next deadline: USAA statement balance $13,125.95 due April 9.

documents.title: Resolved Webhook Fix Instructions
documents.content: Fix: Redirect SamCart webhook to set session_paid=true in Supabase, send access email, then generate PDF only after walkthrough completion. One Claude Code session. This is the only blocker between Resolved and launch.

documents.title: R&D Memo — Resolved Pre-Launch Strategy
documents.content: All 5 analysts on Resolved pre-launch. Sprint: Fix webhook → 20-user beta → update sales page positioning (estate planning alternative framing) + $99 family plan order bump → $200 Meta test. Don't run ads before beta validates completion rate.
